news.headline: Agilent's PD-L1 IHC 28-8 pharmDx receives EU IVDR certification for NSCLC and melanoma, with 9 total indications in Europe.
news.summary: In Santa Clara, California, Agilent Technologies Inc. (NYSE: A) recently shared that its PD-L1 IHC 28-8 pharmDx kit has secured approvals for two new companion diagnostic indications under EU IVDR, broadening treatment accessibility to early-stage non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) and previously untreated advanced melanoma patients. With these additions, the total indications introduced in Europe for PD-L1 IHC 28-8 pharmDx now stand at nine. The kit is exclusively authorized for.

news.headline: White House Economic Advisor Hassett: Be wary of recession talks, expecting the first quarter to squeak into positive category - CNBC
White House Economic Advisor hassett: I expected a negative Q1 related to Biden 'inheritance' and timing related to Trump tariffs - CNBC
Cohen & Company reports Q4 & full year 2024 financial results, declares $0.25/share quarterly dividend twice.
news.summary: The board has announced a quarterly dividend of $0.25 per share.

news.headline: Witan PLC reports net asset value of £1.2 billion.
news.summary: A recent report indicates a surge in COVID-19 cases worldwide, with over 10 million confirmed cases and 500,000 deaths. The United States accounts for a significant portion of these numbers, with over 2.5 million cases and 125,000 deaths. Countries like Brazil, Russia, and India are also experiencing rapid increases in infections. The World Health Organization continues to stress the importance of preventive measures such as wearing masks and practicing social distancing to curb the spread of the virus. Governments are implementing various measures to control the situation, including lockdowns and increased testing. The global economic impact of the pandemic is significant, with unemployment rates rising and businesses struggling to stay afloat. Experts warn that the situation may worsen if proper measures are not taken to mitigate the spread of the virus.

news.headline: Huhtamaki will conduct a sustainability results call soon. #sustainability #Huhtamaki #results #call
Poor ergonomics in manufacturing cause almost 400,000 injuries annually, costing businesses billions.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, in San Diego, it was reported that Flexible Assembly Systems revealed the prevalence of musculoskeletal disorders (MSDs) in manufacturing. These disorders are frequently a result of inadequate ergonomics and pose a considerable challenge for the industry. MSDs have led to nearly 400,000 injuries per year, resulting in substantial financial burdens for employers.

news.headline: White House Economic Advisor Hassett: There are many reasons to be bullish about the US economy despite some blips - CNBC
Syntec Optics partners for breakthrough biosensing in drug discovery, Nasdaq: OPTX involved.
news.summary: In Rochester, New York, on March 10, 2025, Syntec Optics Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: OPTX), a prominent supplier of essential products to technology defense, biomedical, and communications companies, revealed its ongoing partnership to support the creation of an innovative photonic biosensing technology. This collaboration aims to revolutionize drug discovery and testing processes.

news.headline: Pixelworks (NASDAQ: PXLW) to present at 37th ROTH Conference on March 17 in Laguna Cliffs.
news.summary: Portland, Oregon - March 10, 2025 - Pixelworks, a prominent provider of cutting-edge video and display processing technology, disclosed that it is set to appear at the 37th Annual ROTH Conference on March 17, 2025. The conference will occur at the Laguna Cliffs venue. Pixelworks operates on the NASDAQ exchange under the ticker symbol PXLW.

news.headline: Cryptocurrency prices plummeted, facing macro challenges despite Trump's support. #CryptoPricesDown #MacroHeadwinds
Spain’s 2nd biggest bank, BBVA, will provide Bitcoin, Ethereum trading to all 150-year-old bank customers.
news.summary: The 150-year-old bank, one of Europe's largest, plans to make its service accessible to all customers in the future.

news.headline: Xonar Technology Inc. appoints Michael Brletich as COO amid advances in AI security screening systems.
news.summary: Xonar Technology, a company based in St. Petersburg, Florida, recently appointed Michael Brletich as its Chief Operating Officer. The company is making waves in the industry by introducing state-of-the-art security screening systems that are powered by artificial intelligence. This move comes amidst a growing demand for advanced security measures in various sectors. Michael Brletich's appointment as COO is seen as a strategic decision to drive the company's growth further.

news.headline: Global Green HVAC market set to reach US$165.1 billion by 2035, growing at 7.0% CAGR. Europe's heat pump sales dropped 47% in 2024 due to reduced subsidies and lower gas prices. Top players include Carrier, Daikin, Lennox International, Mitsubishi Electric, among others, focusing on eco-friendly innovation.
news.summary: The Global Green HVAC industry, valued at US$78.8 billion in 2024, is projected to reach US$165.1 billion by 2035, with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 7.0%. Environmental regulations and increased adoption of eco-friendly climate control systems are driving this growth. In 2024, the European heat pump market saw a substantial drop, with sales falling by 47% to 765,000 units sold across 13 countries. This decline was linked to reduced government subsidies and lower gas prices, affecting consumers' transition to renewable energy heating systems. Despite challenges, demand for energy-efficient HVAC solutions remains strong due to climate change concerns and regulations promoting green technologies. Leading companies in the industry like Carrier, Daikin, Mitsubishi Electric, and others are driving innovation with eco-friendly advancements to reshape HVAC systems and align with sustainability goals and regulatory standards.

news.headline: SGX to launch Bitcoin futures in second half of 2025, joining major groups like Osaka Dojima; crypto trend on the rise.
news.summary: Bitcoin futures are becoming an increasingly popular trend in the crypto space, with significant international entities like SGX and Japan’s Osaka Dojima aiming to launch Bitcoin futures by 2025. This development highlights the growing interest in the potential of futures trading in the cryptocurrency market.

news.headline: Will Trump gamble on a recession? President champions protectionist trade policies, despite short-term economic risks.
news.summary: The president maintains confidence in his protectionist trade strategies, stating they will benefit the country in the future. He acknowledges the possibility of facing temporary economic challenges but remains optimistic about the long-term results.

news.headline: FICO offers FICO Score Mortgage Simulator through Xactus for lenders, helping drive smarter decisions for more loan options.
news.summary: An analytics software leader, FICO (NYSE: FICO), has revealed that their FICO® Score Mortgage Simulator is now accessible to lenders through Xactus, a top fintech company in verification solutions for mortgages and the largest credit reseller. With this partnership, mortgage professionals can utilize the simulator to make informed decisions, potentially offering more loan choices and better interest rates for clients. This move aims to enhance the mortgage process and customer outcomes.

news.headline: Chris Bilotto appointed as SVC's Managing Trustee, Pres. & CEO on March 10, 2025. He's an EVP of The RMR Group.
news.summary: Newton, Massachusetts - Service Properties Trust has appointed Chris Bilotto as the new Managing Trustee, President, and CEO, effective March 10, 2025. Bilotto currently serves as the Executive Vice President of The RMR Group and is responsible for the acquisition platform, asset management of all hotel and senior living properties, and property development/redevelopment across the United States. This change comes as part of SVC's strategic leadership transition plan, signaling a new chapter for the company.

news.headline: Seven Hills Realty Trust appoints Matthew Brown as CFO and Treasurer, effective March 10, 2025. Brown, a Senior VP of RMR Group, has been with RMR since 2007.
news.summary: Newton, MA - Seven Hills Realty Trust (Nasdaq: SEVN) has named Matthew Brown as the new Chief Financial Officer and Treasurer, starting March 10, 2025. Brown, currently a Senior Vice President at The RMR Group (Nasdaq: RMR), will bring his expertise in accounting, finance, and tax as he transitions to his new role. Having been with RMR since 2007, Brown has held multiple leadership positions in accounting and finance, focusing on reporting and compliance.

news.headline: BTCS partners with ETHGas to optimize Ethereum blockspace, investing $250,000 to achieve faster transaction confirmations compared to Solana.
news.summary: BTCS Inc. has partnered with ETHGas to expand the market of fee-based products on Ethereum's network. The partnership aims to bring ultra-low-latency scaling to Ethereum, enabling transaction confirmations 100 times faster than Solana. BTCS has invested $250,000 in ETHGas and will serve as a Priority Builder. This move aligns with BTCS's strategy to drive revenue growth, improve margins, and enhance efficiency in Ethereum transactions. Founded in 2014, BTCS was the first U.S. public company in Bitcoin mining and has transitioned its focus to Ethereum in recent years. This partnership marks a significant step in their blockchain infrastructure and digital asset innovation journey.

news.headline: Verus Mortgage Capital remains top non-agency RMBS issuer in 2024, with $6.5 billion financed in 12 deals, totaling $31.4 billion since inception.
news.summary: Verus Mortgage Capital (VMC), a prominent correspondent investor focusing on residential non-QM and investor rental programs, solidified its standing as a top issuer of non-agency mortgage-backed securities in the previous year. VMC concentrates on expanded credit/non-QM and investor rental loan programs and successfully funded 12 deals amounting to over $6.5 billion. Over its history, VMC has financed about $31.4 billion across 65 rated securitization transactions, further establishing its position in the market.

news.headline: Essential Properties Realty Trust, Inc. (NYSE: EPRT) declares $0.295 per share quarterly dividend for Q1 2025, $1.18 annualized dividend.
news.summary: Essential Properties Realty Trust, Inc. (NYSE: EPRT) based in Princeton, N.J., has disclosed that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.295 for each share of common stock for Q1 2025. This equates to an annualized dividend of $1.18 per common stock share. The dividend will be distributed on April 11, 2025, to shareholders on record as of March 31, 2025. Essential Properties Realty Trust, Inc. is recognized for its real estate investment portfolio.

news.headline: Westlake Royal Building introduces black frame option to Legacy Collection window line. Responds to demand for darker options.
news.summary: Westlake Royal Building Products has recently launched a black frame option for its Legacy Collection window line under Westlake Royal Window Solutions. The introduction of this new color variant is in response to the increasing desire for darker window frame choices. This trend has been fueled by the popularity of Modern Farmhouse aesthetics, with black frames remaining a sought-after option even as trends evolve. Steve B mentioned the persistent demand for black window frames and other dark shades, emphasizing that such options have remained popular despite changes in home styling preferences. Westlake Royal, a subsidiary of Westlake (NYSE: WLK), aims to cater to this demand through the addition of the black frame option to its product lineup.

news.headline: Jyske Realkredit A/S annual general meeting on March 24, 2025, 8:00 a.m. at Klampenborgvej 205, Kgs. Lyngby.
news.summary: An announcement is being made for the annual general meeting of Jyske Realkredit A/S scheduled for Monday, March 24, 2025 at 8:00 a.m. The meeting will take place at the company's headquarters located at Klampenborgvej 205 in Kgs. Lyngby.

news.headline: Rigel Pharmaceuticals appoints Dr. Mark W. Frohlich to Board of Directors; brings 25+ years of experience.
news.summary: Today, Rigel Pharmaceuticals, Inc. based in South San Francisco, California, disclosed the addition of Mark W. Frohlich, M.D. to its Board of Directors. Dr. Frohlich, a medical oncologist with over 25 years of experience in research and development, joins the board. The company is listed on Nasdaq under the symbol RIGL.

news.headline: Algebrik AI partners with Jack Henry™ to integrate Loan Origination System with Symitar®, targeting finance industry.
news.summary: In New York, Algebrik AI Inc., a company based in New York City and incorporated in Delaware, has unveiled the first cloud-native, AI-driven Loan Origination System (LOS). The company announced its participation in the Jack Henry™ Vendor Integration Program, offering access to technical resources for integrating its Loan Origination Platform with Symitar®. The program aims to enhance connectivity between systems.

news.headline: PEAK3 launches crowdfunding campaign for industrial ATSC 3.0 M.2 receiver "PEAKcast3" for edge computing.
news.summary: An Arizona-based company PEAK3 has introduced a crowdfunding campaign for their new industrial-grade ATSC 3.0 M.2 receiver called "PEAKcast3." The device is designed to incorporate broadcast technology into edge computing systems to provide real-time data delivery at scale, particularly for industries. The receiver is compact in size, suitable for industrial use, and capable of withstanding harsh environments. The campaign aims to raise funds for the production of this innovative technology.

news.headline: CloudLinux CEO to speak at CloudFest 2025 in Germany, unveiling new Max Web Server, 4 p.m. (CET) on March 19 in Berlin.
news.summary: CloudLinux, a prominent player in enhancing Linux server security and stability, revealed that CEO Igor Seletskiy will be a keynote speaker at CloudFest 2025, the biggest global cloud event happening from March 17-20 in Europa-Park, Germany. Seletskiy's keynote will be at 4 p.m. (CET) on March 19 in the .COM Ballroom (Ballsaal Berlin), where he will introduce a new MAx Web Server. This server inclusion is free of charge.

news.headline: nVent Electric plc to acquire Avail Infrastructure Solutions' Electrical Products Group for $975 million, adding $375 million in revenue.
news.summary: Shares of nVent Electric plc (NYSE:NVT) are down in premarket trading today following the announcement of its agreement to purchase Avail Infrastructure Solutions' enclosures, switchgear, and bus systems businesses for a total of $975 million. The acquired Electrical Products Group business, operating in North America, has around 1,100 employees and operates out of nine manufacturing sites in the U.S. The business is expected to generate revenues of about $375 million in the 12 months leading up to February 28, 2025, with a solid backlog of orders. nVent Electric plc anticipates that this acquisition will positively impact adjusted earnings per share.

news.headline: ECFC hosts in-person Advocacy Summit in Washington, D.C. on March 12-13 to discuss tax-advantaged benefits with Congress.
news.summary: ECFC, a prominent nonprofit advocating for benefit choices, is set to host its Advocacy Summit in Washington, D.C., on March 12-13. This pivotal two-day event focuses on amplifying the benefits industry's influence in Capitol Hill. According to Christa Day, ECFC's Executive Director, advocacy plays a crucial role in safeguarding and boosting tax-advantaged benefits. The summit plans to facilitate meetings with House and Senate Congressional staff to further this cause.

news.headline: Aethlon Medical's preclinical data on Hemopurifier in Transplant Immunology Journal suggests broader therapeutic potential beyond virology/oncology. Efforts to evaluate its impact on kidney function.
news.summary: Research findings indicate that the Hemopurifier® may have broader medical applications beyond treating viral infections and cancer, based on preclinical studies. The results suggest that incorporating the Hemopurifier® into a machine perfusion circuit could enhance the function of harvested kidneys. This discovery was made in San Diego on March 10.

news.headline: Hub International buys C&L Marine Insurance in Florida, strengthening marine insurance capabilities. Acquisition of Scott Costolo, Inc. d/b/a C&L Marine Insurance announced on March 10, 2025.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, in Chicago, Hub International Limited (Hub), a prominent global insurance brokerage and financial services company, disclosed the acquisition of Scott Costolo, Inc. operating as C&L Marine Insurance (C&L Marine Insurance). The deal involved the procurement of C&L Marine Insurance's assets, with specific terms of the transaction remaining undisclosed.

news.headline: Rumin8's new product reduces cattle methane emissions by 95.2% in UC Davis trial.
news.summary: In Wayne, Pennsylvania on March 10, 2025, a notable academic institution released the initial scientific results from a Rumin8 animal trial. The study showcased that the investigational veterinary product from Rumin8 successfully decreased overall methane emissions in cattle by an impressive 95.2%. Notably, this reduction in methane levels had no significant effects on other important factors.

news.headline: Hoth Therapeutics to submit Expanded Access App for HT-001 to help cancer patients suffering from EGFR inhibitor treatment effects.
news.summary: Hoth Therapeutics is working on HT-001, a treatment designed to alleviate skin issues caused by EGFR inhibitor therapy in cancer patients. The ongoing clinical trials have shown promising results, and the company aims to make HT-001 accessible to patients facing these adverse effects.

news.headline: Glenmark Therapeutics Inc., USA introduces 17g/capful Polyethylene Glycol 3350 OTC product, similar to MiraLAX®.
news.summary: In Mahwah, New Jersey, on March 10, 2025, Glenmark Therapeutics Inc., based in the USA, revealed the introduction of Polyethylene Glycol 3350, Powder for Solution, in a 17 grams/capful over-the-counter format. This product is being compared to the active ingredient found in MiraLAX® Powder for Solution, which also contains 17 grams and is produced by Bayer.

news.headline: Japanese trade minister to visit US over tariff tensions. Yoji Muto to discuss with officials to avert damages to Japanese firms.
news.summary: Yoji Muto is set to engage in discussions with American authorities prior to the implementation of worldwide tariffs that may harm Japanese corporations, such as major players in the automotive industry.

news.headline: Northstrive Biosciences plans pre-IND meeting with FDA for EL-22, an obesity therapy aiming fat loss and muscle preservation.
news.summary: Northstrive Biosciences, Inc. has set a date for a pre-IND meeting with the FDA regarding EL-22, a promising obesity therapy designed to promote fat loss while preserving muscle mass. EL-22 aims to address the increasing obesity rates worldwide, with recent statistics indicating a rise to approximately 650 million obese individuals globally. The scheduled meeting is a crucial step in the development process, aligning the company with regulatory requirements as it advances towards clinical trials for this innovative treatment approach.

news.headline: Condor Energies Inc. obtains 2nd mining license in Kazakhstan for 6,800-hectare Kolkuduk area, with exploration rights for 6 years.
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, on March 10, 2025, Condor Energies Inc. ("Condor" or "the Company") (TSX: CDR), a Canadian energy transition firm, revealed that it has secured its second key minerals mining license, known as the "Kolkuduk License," from the Government Ministry overseeing mining in Kazakhstan. The 6,800-hectare Kolkuduk License grants Condor a 100% working interest and authorization for solid minerals exploration for a period of six years in the Republic of Kazakhstan.

news.headline: Stereotaxis CEO David Fischel will present at 37th Annual Roth Conference in Dana Point, CA. #STXS #ROTHConf
news.summary: Today, on March 10, 2025, St. Louis-based Stereotaxis, a renowned company specializing in surgical robotics for minimally invasive endovascular intervention, shared news about their upcoming participation in the 37th Annual ROTH Conference in Dana Point, California. The event will feature David Fischel, the Chairman and CEO of Stereotaxis. Stereotaxis is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol NYSE: STXS.

news.headline: Gold Reserve's Dalinar Energy bids for CITGO, parented by PDV Holding, Inc., aiming to be Stalking Horse Bidder for the sale.
news.summary: Gold Reserve Ltd. revealed that its subsidiary, Dalinar Energy Corporation, submitted a bid on March 7, 2025, to become the Stalking Horse Bidder for acquiring the shares of PDV Holding, Inc., the parent company of CITGO Petroleum Corp. The bid was made as part of the sales process overseen by the U.S. District Court for the District of Delaware. Gold Reserve Ltd.'s stocks are listed on TSX.V as GRZ and on OTCQX as GDRZF.

news.headline: Kymeta launches Goshawk u8 terminal for global defense orders amid growing challenges for European allies.
news.summary: A company based in Redmond, Washington, Kymeta, known for its flat-panel satellite antenna technology, has revealed that orders are now open for its Goshawk u8 user terminal. This terminal is tailored for government and global ministry of defense applications. Meeting the increasing demand for adaptable satellite networks and secure open network setups for defense operations, the Goshawk u8 provides a vital solution. In the current climate where allied nations are emphasizing secure, resilient, and swift deployments, the Goshawk u8 addresses these needs effectively.

news.headline: reAlpha received $5 million investment from Mercurius Media Capital LP for advertising inventory exchange.
news.summary: In Dublin, Ohio, on March 10, 2025, reAlpha Tech Corp. (Nasdaq: AIRE), a real estate technology company focusing on artificial intelligence (AI), disclosed a noteworthy development. They have secured a strategic investment totaling $5 million from Mercurius Media Capital LP, a media fund specializing in offering advertising space in return for ownership stakes in ventures. This infusion of funds represents a crucial achievement for reAlpha as it propels forward with its plans to enhance media presence and marketing efforts for broader brand recognition across the nation.

news.headline: Martina Minerals Corp. issues 9,163,000 common shares to 6 creditors in exchange for cancelling $320,705 debt.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, Martina Minerals Corp. revealed adjustments to its debt conversion plan. The Corporation revised the debt conversion agreements with six creditors, all independent from the Corporation. Under the amended terms, Martina Minerals Corp. will issue a total of 9,163,000 common shares (referred to as "Debt Shares") to the Creditors. In return, $320,705 in debt will be annulled.

news.headline: Blade Air Mobility and Skyports to launch NYC-JFK flights, pilot program to gather commuter demand info.
news.summary: A new pilot program has been launched to provide crucial information to Skyports and Blade regarding commuter demand, ground operation protocols, and consumer experience in preparation for the deployment of eVTOL aircraft. The program aims to familiarize Skyports and Blade with the demand of commuters and the best practices for ground operations, while also focusing on enhancing the overall consumer experience. This initiative is expected to pave the way for the successful introduction of eVTOL aircraft in the near future.

news.headline: Plus and TIER IV join forces in Japan to advance autonomy with driverless trucks using AI-based software.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, in Tokyo and Santa Clara, a strategic partnership was unveiled between Plus, a prominent company in AI-based autonomous trucking software, and TIER IV, known for creating the first open-source software for autonomous driving. This collaboration aims to expedite advancements in the autonomous driving industry.

news.headline: Ispire Technology Inc. will attend 37th Annual ROTH Conference, March 16-18, 2025.
news.summary: Ispire Technology Inc. (NASDAQ: ISPR), a leading company in vaping technology and precision dosing, revealed today its involvement in the upcoming 37th Annual ROTH Conference scheduled for March 16-18, 2025. The conference, a prominent event in the industry, will offer a platform for networking and showcasing innovations.

news.headline: UNITY Biotechnology appoints Yehia Hashad, M.D. to its Board of Directors. Dr. Hashad is an ophthalmology expert and executive at Bausch + Lomb.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, UNITY Biotechnology, Inc. disclosed that Yehia Hashad, M.D., the current executive vice president of research and development and chief medical officer at Bausch + Lomb, will be joining their board of directors and science committee. UNITY focuses on creating treatments to impede, stop, or undo age-related illnesses. The company is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker UBX.

news.headline: Beacon and Renovate Robotics partner in roofing automation, with focus on safety and productivity. Beacon (Nasdaq: BECN), a specialty distributor, invests in Renovate Robotics, based in Brooklyn.
news.summary: Beacon, the prominent public specialty wholesale distributor of roofing and related products, headquartered in Herndon, Virginia, revealed a significant step today. The company, listed on Nasdaq as BECN, disclosed a strategic collaboration with Renovate Robotics, based in Brooklyn, New York, a trailblazer in the field of roofing automation. Renovate Robotics is widely recognized for their innovative work in creating autonomous robots specifically designed for roofing tasks, aimed at enhancing safety and efficiency for contractors. The initial robot introduced by Renovate Robotics is named Rufus. This partnership marks a move by Beacon to tap into the potential of robotics technology and revolutionize the roofing industry.

news.headline: Calidi Biotherapeutics can deliver transient gene therapy to tumors using systemic platform, killing over 60 tumor cell lines.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, Calidi Biotherapeutics Inc. (NYSE American: CLDI) revealed positive preclinical results for its systemic RTNova platform, showcasing successful delivery of transient gene therapy payloads to specific tumors. The company's tumor-specific virotherapy exhibited effectiveness in eradicating more than 60 diverse tumor cell types.

news.headline: CrowdStrike wins Frost & Sullivan's 2024 Company of the Year for SaaS Security; CrowdStrike Falcon® Shield excels in managing SaaS misconfigurations, identities, threats.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on March 10, 2025, CrowdStrike Falcon® Shield has been acknowledged by Frost & Sullivan as the Company of the Year for 2024. This recognition underscores CrowdStrike's status as a leader in providing top-notch protection and management against SaaS misconfigurations, identities, and threats. CrowdStrike Falcon® Shield stands out for its capability to unify hybrid identity protection, ensuring robust security measures are in place. This distinction highlights the company's dedication to delivering cutting-edge solutions in the cybersecurity realm, solidifying its position in the industry.
